mapper.sql: id, title, surface, bottom, difficulty, tags, sort_order, active, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO turtle_soup_stories ( title, surface, bottom, difficulty, tags, sort_order, active, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{surface}, #{bottom}, #{difficulty}, #{tags}, #{sortOrder}, #{active}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON CONFLICT(surface) DO UPDATE SET title = excluded.title, bottom = excluded.bottom, difficulty = excluded.difficulty, tags = excluded.tags, sort_order = excluded.sort_order, active = excluded.active, updated_at = excluded.updated_at
mapper.update: UPDATE turtle_soup_stories SET active = 0, updated_at = strftime('%s','now') * 1000
mapper.select: SELECT FROM turtle_soup_stories WHERE active = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT r.id, r.room_id, r.story_id, r.round_no, r.host_key, r.host_name, r.guesser_key, r.guesser_name, r.guess_limit, r.guess_used, r.result, r.qa_json, r.started_at, r.ended_at, s.title, s.surface, s.bottom, s.difficulty, s.tags FROM turtle_soup_records r JOIN turtle_soup_stories s ON s.id = r.story_id WHERE r.host_key = #{playerKey} OR r.guesser_key = #{playerKey} ORDER BY r.ended_at DESC, r.id DESC

SELECT r.id, r.room_id, r.story_id, r.round_no, r.host_key, r.host_name, r.guesser_key, r.guesser_name, r.guess_limit, r.guess_used, r.result, r.qa_json, r.started_at, r.ended_at, s.title, s.surface, s.bottom, s.difficulty, s.tags FROM turtle_soup_records r JOIN turtle_soup_stories s ON s.id = r.story_id ORDER BY r.ended_at DESC, r.id DESC
